title: piper betle f. marianum
intro: Piper betle f. marianum, also known as the betel vine or 'paan' in some parts of the world, is a perennial climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Piper betle f. marianum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving oral health, and acting as a natural breath freshener. Herbal preparations of the plant include chewing the leaves with betel nut, making a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or consuming it as a capsule or tincture.
